summary: Comprehensive testing of RiftMarket Roblox marketplace completed successfully. All core functionality working including admin panel, game/product management, cart system, and order flow.

fixed_issues.issue: Route conflict causing 404 error when no products exist
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Moved best-sellers route before generic product/{id} route

design_issues.issue: Missing aria-describedby warnings in console for admin dialogs

passed_tests: Landing page loads with animated hero and all sections
Backend API: GET /api/games returns empty array initially
Backend API: GET /api/stats/public returns correct stats
Backend API: GET /api/products/best-sellers returns empty array
Admin login with correct credentials (admin@riftmarket.com / RiftAdmin2026!)
Admin dashboard loads with stats panel and all tabs
Admin can create games via admin panel
Admin can create products for games
Game page /game/blox-fruits shows game and products correctly
Cart sidebar opens and functions properly
Add to cart works from product cards
Checkout flow: fill name/email, place order successfully
Order confirmation page shows Order ID and Discord instructions
Complete end-to-end user journey from landing to order completion
